import asyncio
from planday.main import PlanDayAgent

async def test_queries():
    agent = PlanDayAgent()
    session_id = ''test_session''
    
    print(''=== 测试1: 查询明天的安排 ==='')
    result1 = await agent.chat(''我明天有什么安排'', session_id)
    print(f''Response: {result1[""response""]}'')
    print()
    
    print(''=== 测试2: 查询今天的安排 ==='')
    result2 = await agent.chat(''我今天有什么安排'', session_id)
    print(f''Response: {result2[""response""]}'')
    print()

asyncio.run(test_queries())
")

import asyncio
from planday.main import PlanDayAgent

async def test_comprehensive():
    agent = PlanDayAgent()
    session_id = ''comprehensive_test''
    
    tests = [
        (''我9月25日的安排是什么'', ''日期查询测试''),
        (''更新""测试会议""的时间为明天上午7点到8点'', ''事件更新测试''),
        (''我七月前要完成期末复习'', ''任务创建测试''),
        (''我已经完成了期末复习'', ''任务状态更新测试''),
        (''我要开始学习画画了，请你为我安排一个规划'', ''智能规划测试''),
    ]
    
    for query, test_name in tests:
        print(f''=== {test_name} ==='')
        print(f''Query: {query}'')
        result = await agent.chat(query, session_id)
        print(f''Response: {result[""response""]}'')
        print(f''Success: {result.get(""success"", False)}'')
        print()

asyncio.run(test_comprehensive())
")
